description: Implement the Cobra-based CLI in cmd/flywheel/. Commands: init (load+validate+preview), run (execute engine), status (show task states), review (list/approve/reject), clean (remove worktrees+state), validate (check tasks+DAG). Handle SIGINT/SIGTERM gracefully. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 10 for all commands, flags, and signal handling requirements.
commit: feat(cli): add Cobra CLI with init, run, status, review, clean, and validate commands
steps: Refactor cmd/flywheel/main.go to use cobra root command with --config flag (default: flywheel.json)
Implement 'init' command: load tasks, build DAG, validate, print execution plan with waves and estimated parallelism, create .flywheel/ directory
Implement 'run' command: load config, build engine, call engine.Run(). Flags: --max-parallel, --verbose, --dry-run. Stream progress to stdout.
Implement 'status' command: print table of all tasks with lifecycle status. 'status {task_id}' for detail. --lifecycle flag for full timeline.
Implement 'review' subcommands: 'review list' shows tasks awaiting human review, 'review approve {id}' approves, 'review reject {id} --reason' rejects
Implement 'clean' command: remove all worktrees, delete flywheel branches, clean .flywheel/ state. --worktrees-only flag.
Implement 'validate' subcommands: 'validate tasks' checks task definitions, 'validate dag' builds DAG and reports cycles/warnings
Add SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers: cancel engine context, wait for workers with timeout, save state, print summary
acceptance_criteria: flywheel init loads tasks, validates DAG, prints wave-based execution plan
flywheel run executes the engine with configurable parallelism
flywheel run --dry-run prints plan without executing
flywheel status shows a table of all tasks and their states
flywheel status {id} shows detailed lifecycle for one task
flywheel review list/approve/reject work for HITL workflow
flywheel clean removes worktrees and state
flywheel validate tasks/dag check definitions without executing
SIGINT triggers graceful shutdown: cancel context, wait for workers, save state
go build ./cmd/flywheel/ produces a working binary
